page.title: Create Proposal
page.description: Create a new proposal for the Gnars DAO

details.title: Proposal Details
details.description: Provide the basic information for your proposal
details.descriptionPlaceholder:
Describe your proposal in detail...

You can use **markdown** formatting:
- **Bold text**
- *Italic text*
- `Code snippets`

Explain the problem, solution, and expected outcomes.
details.descriptionHelper: Markdown formatting supported. Be thorough and clear about your proposal's purpose and impact.
details.templateHelper: Fill in the sections below. Your answers are compiled into the proposal.

banner.fileTooLarge: File size must be less than 10MB

transactions.title: Proposal Transactions
transactions.description: Add one or more transactions that will be executed if this proposal passes

sendEth.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the purpose of this payment...

sendUsdc.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the purpose of this USDC transfer...

sendTokens.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the purpose of this token transfer...

sendNfts.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the purpose of this NFT transfer...

droposal.title: Droposal Details
droposal.collectionDescPlaceholder: A special edition drop for the Gnars community...
droposal.priceHelper: Zora charges 0.000777 ETH per mint as a protocol fee.
droposal.useRevenueSplitDesc: Create a split contract to share NFT sales revenue among multiple recipients
droposal.payoutAddressHelper: Address that receives mint proceeds and royalties (defaults to DAO treasury)
droposal.splitCreatedDesc: This address will receive NFT sales and be included in the proposal.
droposal.saleStartHelper: Auto-calculated based on proposal timeline: voting delay + voting period + timelock delay + 1 day buffer.
droposal.saleEndHelper: Leave empty for no end time (indefinite sale).
droposal.editionTypeHelper: Open edition allows unlimited mints. Fixed edition has a maximum supply.
droposal.adminHelper: Address that can manage the collection (defaults to connected wallet)

buyCoin.infoDesc: This transaction will use the Zora Coins SDK to purchase a content or creator coin from the treasury. The swap executes through Uniswap v4 with Zora hooks.
buyCoin.coinAddressHelper: ERC-20 address of the content or creator coin
buyCoin.ethAmountHelper: Amount of ETH to spend from treasury

custom.infoDesc: Custom transactions require technical knowledge. Make sure you understand the contract interaction.
custom.descriptionPlaceholder: Clearly describe what this transaction does...

budget.noBudgetLines: No budget lines yet. Add one to request funding.

preview.title: Proposal Preview
preview.description: Review your proposal before submitting to the DAO

checklist.transactionDetails: Ensure all transaction details are correct
checklist.ipfsUpload: Your proposal metadata will be uploaded to IPFS
checklist.governorSubmit: The proposal will be submitted to the Governor contract
checklist.cannotModify: Once submitted, the proposal cannot be modified
checklist.votingDelay: Voting will begin after a short delay period

preview.minimumVotes: Minimum to create a proposal: {count} votes. This comes from the Governor contract proposal threshold.
preview.connectToCheck: Connect your wallet to check eligibility and submit.
preview.insufficientVotes: You need at least {required} votes to create a proposal.
preview.walletPending: Transaction pending... Please confirm in your wallet.
preview.proposalLive: Proposal #{number} is live on the Gnars DAO.
preview.waitingIndex: Transaction confirmed. Waiting for the subgraph to index your proposal…
preview.indexingTimeout: Transaction confirmed. Indexing is taking longer than expected — refresh the proposals page in a minute.
preview.proposalSubmitted: Your proposal has been successfully submitted to the Gnars DAO.
preview.connectWalletToSubmit: Connect wallet to submit a proposal
preview.pleaseFixErrors: Please fix validation errors before submitting

templates.pageDescription: Start from a proven structure. Each template is based on the 77 proposals that Gnars DAO has already funded — pick the one that fits your idea.

pick.title: Pick a template
pick.description: Choose the category that matches your proposal. Each has tailored sections and guidance.

fill.title: Fill in the sections
fill.description: Replace the placeholder text with your project details. The structure keeps you on track.

submit.title: Add transactions & submit
submit.description: Configure funding requests, then preview and submit your proposal on-chain.

templates.blankProposalDesc: Start from scratch — no template, full creative freedom.

tips.deliverables: Be specific about deliverables and timelines
tips.links: Include links to past work or references
